2606.07245.title: AI Sovereignty: A Qualitative Model of Strategic Competition as AI Becomes an Instrument of National Power
2606.07245.paper_summary: AI sovereignty is the extent to which a nation independently controls its artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. The race toward ever-more-sophisticated frontier AI models is of increasing strategic importance, with nations considering how AI might improve their economic situations, competitive advantage, and overall national power. However, the costs of AI sovereignty are enormous, and we lack definitions and conceptual models to navigate evolving AI sovereignty dynamics. We address this gap with definitions relevant to AI sovereignty, along with a first-of-its-kind qualitative model that incorporates micro, meso, and macro contributors. Model-based qualitative forecasts highlight competitive dynamics and evolving potential for AI-driven national power. The model identifies key leverage points that nations can use to enhance their own growth or degrade an adversary's, including consideration of accelerators, electricity, water, data sets and skilled workforce. These leverage points can be activated at strategic and operational levels through both direct kinetic actions, such as Iran's targeting of data centers with drones, and indirect non-kinetic effects including cyber, space, information, economic coercion and diplomacy. If our assumptions and hypotheses are valid, this strategic competition may come to define how nations improve their economic situations, competitive advantage, and overall national power in the 21st Century.
2606.07245.paper_summary_zh: AI主權是指一個國家獨立控制其人工智慧（AI）技術的程度。朝著越來越複雜的前沿AI模型的競賽具有日益重要的戰略意義，各國考慮AI如何改善其經濟狀況、競爭優勢和整體國家實力。然而，AI主權的成本是巨大的，我們缺乏定義和概念模型來應對不斷演變的AI主權動態。我們通過與AI主權相關的定義，以及一個首創的質性模型來填補這一空白，該模型納入了微觀、中觀和宏觀的貢獻者。基於模型的質性預測突顯了競爭動態和AI驅動的國家力量的演變潛力。該模型確定了各國可以用來增強自身增長或削弱對手的關鍵槓桿點，包括考慮加速器、電力、水資源、數據集和熟練勞動力。這些槓桿點可以通過直接的動能行動（例如伊朗用無人機瞄準數據中心）和間接的非動能影響（包括網絡、太空、信息、經濟脅迫和外交）在戰略和操作層面上被啟動。如果我們的假設和假說是有效的，這場戰略競爭可能會定義國家在21世紀如何改善其經濟狀況、競爭優勢和整體國家實力。
2606.07245.author: Timothy Clancy et.al.
